import importlib.resources as pkg_resources


def load_default_config():
    return pkg_resources.read_text("mypackage.config", "defaults.json")


def get_template():
    return pkg_resources.read_text("mypackage.templates", "report.html")


def load_seed_data():
    ref = pkg_resources.files("mypackage.data").joinpath("seeds.csv")
    return ref.read_text().splitlines()
